mapper.select:
SELECT CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS userId, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS userNm, UG.USER_GRP_ID AS userGrpId, UG.USER_GRP_NM AS userGrpNm, UG.DESCRIPTION AS description, UG.USE_YN AS useYn FROM mhdb.TB_USER_GROUP UG WHERE 1 = 1
AND UG.USER_GRP_ID = #{userGroupId}
AND UG.USER_GRP_NM ILIKE '%' || #{userGroupNm} || '%'
ORDER BY UG.USER_GRP_ID, UG.USER_GRP_NM

SELECT I.USER_ID AS userId, I.USER_NM AS userNm, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS userGrpId, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS userGrpNm, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS description, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS useYn FROM mhdb.TB_USER_INFO I LEFT OUTER JOIN mhdb.TB_USER_MEMBER M ON I.USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE I.USE_YN != 'D' AND M.USER_GRP_ID IS NULL ORDER BY I.USER_NM

SELECT I.USER_ID AS userId, I.USER_NM AS userNm, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS userGrpId, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS userGrpNm, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS description, CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS useYn FROM mhdb.TB_USER_INFO I INNER JOIN mhdb.TB_USER_MEMBER M ON I.USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE I.USE_YN != 'D'
AND M.USER_GRP_ID = #{userGroupId}::integer
ORDER BY I.USER_NM
mapper.update: UPDATE mhdb.TB_USER_GROUP SET USER_GRP_NM = #{userGrpNm}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, USE_YN = #{useYn} WHERE USER_GRP_ID = #{userGrpId}::integer
